content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/lib/auth.ts:1	import { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";2	import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";3	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";4	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";5	6	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {7	  providers: [8	    CredentialsProvider({9	      name: "Credentials",10	      credentials: {11	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },12	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" }13	      },14	      async authorize(credentials) {15	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) return null;16	        17	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({18	          where: { email: credentials.email }19	        });20	21	        if (!user || !user.password) return null;22	23	        const isValid = await bcrypt.compare(credentials.password, user.password);24	25	        if (!isValid) return null;26	27	        return {28	          id: user.id,29	          email: user.email,30	          name: user.name,31	          role: user.role,32	        };33	      }34	    })35	  ],36	  callbacks: {37	    async jwt({ token, user }) {38	      if (user) {39	        token.role = (user as any).role;40	      }41	      return token;42	    },43	    async session({ session, token }) {44	      if (session.user) {45	        (session.user as any).role = token.role;46	      }47	      return session;48	    }49	  },50	  pages: {51	    signIn: "/login",52	  },53	  session: {54	    strategy: "jwt",55	  },56	};
